snapshot.name: Active Signal v1
snapshot.description: System snapshot migrated from the historical active_signal runtime strategy.

fields.name: atr_1
fields.description: Relative 14-period ATR, expressed as ATR divided by close.

fields.name: cl_15m
fields.description: Classifier output aligned to the 1h anchor frame using the 15m candlestick model. Class 0: long base then powerful upside impulse, sometimes in multiple steps; class 1: broad volatile sideways range with a downward bias; class 2: persistent decline through most of the window; class 3: sharp opening surge then hold at elevated levels with slight continued rise.

value_semantics.meaning: Long base then powerful upside impulse, sometimes in multiple steps.
Broad volatile sideways range with a downward bias.
Persistent decline through most of the window.
Sharp opening surge then hold at elevated levels with slight continued rise.

fields.name: cl_1d
fields.description: Classifier output aligned to the 1h anchor frame using the 1d candlestick model. Class 0: long flat base then sharp upside pump; class 1: monotonic downtrend with acceleration into a weak rebound; class 2: smooth rise into a local top then short pullback; class 3: strong uptrend that accelerates into the end; class 4: wide volatile range with a rounded top then decline.

value_semantics.meaning: Long flat base then sharp upside pump.
Monotonic downtrend with acceleration into a weak rebound.
Smooth rise into a local top then short pullback.
Strong uptrend that accelerates into the end.
Wide volatile range with a rounded top then decline.

fields.name: cl_1h
fields.description: Classifier output aligned to the 1h anchor frame using the 1h candlestick model. Class 0: sideways to weak down drift followed by a sharp late selloff; class 1: strong early drop then weak bottom-side consolidation; class 2: fast rise in the first half then topping plateau or light pullback; class 3: steady upward acceleration through most of the window, sometimes with a final upside burst.

value_semantics.meaning: Sideways to weak down drift followed by a sharp late selloff.
Strong early drop then weak bottom-side consolidation.
Fast rise in the first half then topping plateau or light pullback.
Steady upward acceleration through most of the window, sometimes with a final upside burst.

fields.name: cl_4h
fields.description: Classifier output aligned to the 1h anchor frame using the 4h candlestick model. Class 0: accumulation/flat base then vertical upside breakout near the end; class 1: rise in the first half then topping and soft drift/distribution; class 2: near-continuous stair-step rally without a deep pullback; class 3: clear downtrend with at most a small rebound late; class 4: volatile arc/hump followed by rollover and decline.

value_semantics.meaning: Accumulation or flat base then vertical upside breakout near the end.
Rise in the first half then topping and soft drift or distribution.
Near-continuous stair-step rally without a deep pullback.
Clear downtrend with at most a small rebound late.
Volatile arc or hump followed by rollover and decline.

fields.name: dow
fields.description: UTC day-of-week of the decision time for each row, aligned to when that row becomes actionable.

value_semantics.meaning: Monday.
Tuesday.
Wednesday.
Thursday.
Friday.
Saturday.
Sunday.

fields.name: hour
fields.description: UTC hour of the decision time for each row, aligned to when that row becomes actionable.

fields.name: iv_est
fields.description: Bucketed IV regime derived from iv_est_1 using the IV runtime categorization.

value_semantics.meaning: Lowest implied-volatility bucket after clamping on the fixed five-bin scale.
Low implied-volatility bucket below the q_iv_40 threshold.
Mid implied-volatility bucket around the center of the fixed five-bin scale.
High implied-volatility bucket below the top bucket threshold.
Highest implied-volatility bucket after clamping on the fixed five-bin scale.

fields.name: iv_est_1
fields.description: Hourly implied-volatility estimate aligned from managed Deribit DVOL reference data.

fields.name: rsi
fields.description: Bucketed RSI regime from rsi_1, mapped into five percentile-based categories.

value_semantics.meaning: Lowest RSI bucket after clamping; strongest oversold-style regime in the fixed five-bin scale.
Low RSI bucket below the historical 40th-percentile cutoff.
Middle RSI bucket around the historical center of the fixed five-bin scale.
High RSI bucket above the historical 60th-percentile cutoff.
Highest RSI bucket after clamping; strongest overbought-style regime in the fixed five-bin scale.

fields.name: rsi_1
fields.description: Raw 14-period RSI value computed from the anchor timeframe close series.

signals.entry_logic_code: result = dow in [0,1,2,3,6] and sum([iv_est in [3,4], rsi in [1], hour in [6], cl_1h in [2]])>=3

signals.name: Feature Short
